title: OpenWork brand kit config
description: Single source of truth a distributor edits to rebrand OpenWork. Consumed by scripts/brandkit/apply.mjs at build time. Nothing here is committed into upstream-tracked source files.

name.description: User-facing product name. Replaces the standalone word 'OpenWork' in UI strings, window title, and packaged app name.

shortName.description: Optional short name for tight spaces. Defaults to `name`.

accentColor.description: Radix color family used as the UI accent (maps to --dls-accent* CSS vars).

assets.description: Repo-relative paths to the distributor's brand assets. Missing files are skipped with a warning so a first run still succeeds.

appId.description: Reverse-DNS bundle id for the packaged app (electron-builder appId).

deepLinkScheme.description: Custom URL scheme for deep links (replaces 'openwork'). Lowercase, no ':' or '//'.

providers.description: Which LLM providers the distributor allows. End users still enter their own API key.

allowed.description: OpenCode provider ids to expose (e.g. 'openrouter', 'anthropic', 'openai'). Others are hidden from the picker.

hide.description: Hide all OpenWork Cloud / Den surfaces (cloud settings group, sign-in entry points, workers).

requireSignin.description: Whether to force account sign-in. Brand-kit default is false.

welcome.description: Content for the brand-owned welcome page. Generated into brand/overrides/welcome-page.tsx and served via the reroute plugin — the app's original welcome-page.tsx is never modified.

showSignIn.description: Show the 'Joining a team? Sign in' link. Default false.

showcaseTitle.description: Heading for the right-hand showcase panel, one array entry per line.

features.description: Feature cards in the showcase panel.
